title: Impressive performances in promotion league
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Two George-based teams, Thembalethu and Ramblers, recorded impressive victories during the past weekend's SWD Six Gun Grill Promotion League competition.


> Heidelberg United (287 all out) at home stunned Mossel Bay (254 all out) with a 33-run victory. For Heidelberg, Berthal September hit 152.


Thembalethu at home defeated Ladismith by six wickets courtesy of a half century by Thabo Dywili (69) and bowling figures of 5/53 by Joseph Sonti.

Tight bowling by Davino Koert (3/35), Henrico Stal (3/27) and Liberto Carelse (2/28) took Ramblers to a nail-biting four-wicket victory against New Dawn Park in their derby match at Rosemoor.

The summarised scorecards are:

Thembalethu beat Ladismith by 6 wickets:

Ladismith 146 all out (Kurt Fourie 41, Jaco Fortuin 26, Raymond April 26, Joseph Sonti 5/53, Igcobe Khitshini 2/8, Kamvalethu Feni 2/8)

Thembalethu 148/4 - 29.4 overs (Thabo Dywili 69, Athenkosi Mapono 26, Lukhanyo Makula 22, Ronald Adams 2/30, Kurt Fourie 2/59)

Ramblers beat New Dawn Park by 4 runs:

Ramblers 136 all out - 40.1 overs (Shanon Nomdoe 45, Reagan Kiewiet 2/26,

B Scheepers 2/18, Steven Heath 2/24)

New Dawn Park 132 all out - 34.4 overs (M Basterman 23, Davino Koert 3/35, Henwico Stal 3/27, Liberto Carelse 2/28)

Heidelberg United beat Mossel Bay by 33 runs:

Heidelberg United 287 all out (47.4 overs) (Berthal September 152, Duan Roberts 30, Jacque Thyse 30, Zayed Jacobs 4/54, Ruaan Moore 2/69)

Mossel Bay 254 all out - 45.6 overs (Prashan Kanjee 83, Aseza Mzingeli 34, Jaylin Opperman 4/52, G van Rooyen 3/24)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
